home.title: Free Developer Tools
home.desc: Simple, fast, browser-based tools for everyday dev tasks.

json.title: JSON Formatter
json.desc: Format, validate, and beautify JSON instantly.

base64.title: Base64 Encoder / Decoder
base64.desc: Encode or decode Base64 strings instantly.

timestamp.title: Timestamp Converter
timestamp.desc: Convert Unix timestamps to human-readable dates.
timestamp.label: Convert timestamp to date

regex.title: Regex Tester
regex.desc: Test and debug regular expressions in real time.

color.title: Color Picker
color.desc: Pick a color and get HEX, RGB, HSL values instantly.

qrcode.title: QR Code Generator
qrcode.desc: Generate a QR code for any URL or text instantly.
qrcode.label: URL or Text

footer: All tools are free and run in your browser
